title: pachypleuria papuana
intro: Pachypleuria papuana, also known as the Papua polypore or Papua tooth fungus, is a species of fungus in the family Meruliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pachypleuria papuana include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and even some types of cancer. Pachypleuria papuana is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties.
